notes: Panelboard/switchboard feeders; bilge blowers; electronic equipment; navigation lights; any circuit where voltage drop should be kept to a minimum
Lighting (non-navigation) and other circuits where voltage drop is not critical
All circuits — maximum permitted voltage drop as fraction of nominal voltage
Equipment vital to safety where voltage drop is critical — 3% is acceptable
Defers to ISO 13297 (≤50V DC) or IEC 60092-507 (AC) — no independent limit set
Defers to ABYC E-11 for all wiring requirements including voltage drop
